description_long: This sculpture depicts a nude male figure standing upright on a rectangular base, with both arms missing from just above the biceps. The figure is highly detailed, showing defined musculature in the torso, abdomen, and legs, and features a classical contrapposto stance with the weight shifted onto the right leg. The left leg is slightly bent and set back, with the left foot resting on the base, while the right foot is forward and flat. Behind the left leg, a vertical support element resembling a tree trunk or column provides structural stability. The head is turned slightly to the right, and the facial features are finely rendered, with short, stylized hair. The surface of the sculpture is smooth and appears to be made of white or light gray marble, with subtle weathering and patina visible in some areas.
description: A detailed marble sculpture of a nude male figure in a classical pose, missing both arms and supported by a vertical element behind the left leg. The figure stands on a rectangular base with realistic anatomical features and a smooth, lightly weathered surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full frontal anatomy, missing arms, and the face turned slightly to the right.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the muscular torso, bent left leg, and the vertical support behind the leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back musculature, buttocks, and the support structure extending from the base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, chest, and the support element behind the left leg.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
